apps.title: Planning Lab
apps.subtitle: RL vs Transformer Bench
apps.description: Interactive comparison of reinforcement learning and transformer next-token prediction for strategic planning, anchored to primary arXiv papers from 2017 to 2026.

apps.title: SDA·RL Benchmark Index
apps.subtitle: Space Domain Awareness × Reinforcement Learning
apps.description: A live, filterable comparison of every reinforcement-learning benchmark in the Space Domain Awareness literature — narrow-FOV SSA environments, OrbitZoo, NORAD TLE agents, Space-Track ephemeris pipelines, Starlink validation, BSK-RL, KSPDG, SPLID — with side-by-side notes on strengths, limitations, and reproducibility.

apps.title: SDA RL Benchmarks Dashboard
apps.subtitle: Live comparison of reinforcement learning benchmarks for Space Domain Awareness
apps.description: Interactive dashboard comparing 16 reinforcement learning benchmarks and environments for Space Domain Awareness and Space Situational Awareness (2016-2026). Filter by dataset type, real vs. simulated data, RSO count, sensor modality, and code availability. Side-by-side comparison view with strengths, limitations, reproducibility notes, action/observation/reward formulations, and direct links to papers and code. Covers narrow-FOV SSA sensor tasking (MIT ARCLab), OrbitZoo (NeurIPS 2025, Starlink-validated), NORAD TLE-based environments (Oakes AMOS 2024), KSPDG, BSK-RL, SPLID/AI-SSA Challenge, EOS-Bench, and more.
apps.title: RL in Wargames and Military Simulations
apps.subtitle: Methods, case studies, and DoD outlook (2020 to 2026)
apps.description: 14-page survey of reinforcement learning in DoD wargaming and military simulation. Covers AlphaDogfight, DARPA ACE on X-62A, Gamebreaker, SCEPTER, NPS hierarchical RL, the U.S. Army CGSC AI wargame, DIU Thunderforge, and USAF WarMatrix, with a 12-system comparison table, success metrics, persistent challenges, and a future outlook for 2026 to 2030.
